channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Bitcoin stalls at 76k as two futures stories clash: a quiet bid for 85k by June lurking behind resistance. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-target-btc-85k-by-june-despite-technical-weakness #btc #crypto #markets
item.description: Bitcoin stalls at 76k as two futures stories clash: a quiet bid for 85k by June lurking behind resistance. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260428-price-prediction-target-btc-85k-by-june-despite-technical-weakness #btc #crypto #markets

item.title: Block throws open the vault: 8,883 BTC verifiable on‑chain, Cash App and Square users can confirm holdings themselves. 🔒✨ https://Blockchain.News/news/jack-dorsey-block-bitcoin-proof-of-reserves #Bitcoin #PoR #Transparency
item.description: Block throws open the vault: 8,883 BTC verifiable on‑chain, Cash App and Square users can confirm holdings themselves. 🔒✨ https://Blockchain.News/news/jack-dorsey-block-bitcoin-proof-of-reserves #Bitcoin #PoR #Transparency

item.title: When top-tier sales unlocks growth, products stop selling themselves. Build the playbook, hire the right leader, win lighthouse accounts, and loop learnings back into product. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/world-class-enterprise-sales-team #Sales #Crypto #Growth
item.description: When top-tier sales unlocks growth, products stop selling themselves. Build the playbook, hire the right leader, win lighthouse accounts, and loop learnings back into product. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/world-class-enterprise-sales-team #Sales #Crypto #Growth
